scripts.install:all: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && bun install
scripts.dev: trap 'kill 0' INT; (cd backend && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000) 2>&1 | sed 's/^/[backend]  /' & (cd frontend && bun run dev) 2>&1 | sed 's/^/[frontend] /' & wait
scripts.lint: cd frontend && bun run lint && bun run check
